context. jing yuan as your hubby and the father of your child? yes please.

heвҖҷs always loved the idea of settling down, having a family of his own and hiding them away in a safe spot where no harm can reach them. his work as a military general is pretty tough and requires a lot of dedication. but the idea of having a family waiting for his return every time he leaves gives him something to look forward to.

tonight, he watches over his precious little child like a protective father, while simultaneously awaiting your return back home. youвҖҷve been gone awhile, but when you do come home, jing yuan is certainly pleased to see you back in one piece.
